purpose: Research corpus for the experimental Tripadvisor POI source connector. This is not consolidated POI data and is not a live scrape.

discoveryMethod: Open the public Tripadvisor destination tourism page for Luperon.
Inspect the highlighted place cards exposed on the destination page.
Capture each visible place name as an unresolved POI candidate.
Capture detail-page URL and visible listing metadata when available.
Inspect each detail page for visible address and map-location links.
Do not treat listing presence or a map viewport center as proof of exact location.

detailResearch.name: Puerto Blanco Marina
detailResearch.researchNote: The detail URL was obtained from the destination listing, but the research fetcher returned a cache-miss error. No address or coordinates are asserted.

detailResearch.name: The Patio
detailResearch.researchNote: The detail URL was obtained from the destination listing, but the research fetcher returned a cache-miss error. No address or coordinates are asserted.

detailResearch.name: La Yola
detailResearch.researchNote: The detail URL was obtained from the destination listing, but the research fetcher could not load the page. No address or coordinates are asserted.

detailResearch.name: Las Velas Restaurant
detailResearch.researchNote: The detail URL was obtained from the destination listing, but the research fetcher could not load the page. No address or coordinates are asserted.

detailResearch.name: FricoLandia - El Nunca Jamás
detailResearch.researchNote: The public detail page exposed the visible address and an Ubicación link to Google Maps. The coordinates are embedded in that map-link URL.

researchNotes: The five names are preserved as observed candidates from the destination-page listing research.
Candidate type hints are provisional and may be corrected by later evidence.
A detail-page fetch failure means not observed in this research run; it does not mean the source lacks the data.
The connector must preserve provenance and must not invent coordinates for unresolved candidates.
Future research should continue with JSON-LD and embedded application-state inspection when public detail pages are observable.
